pageInfo.pagePurpose: This page serves as an entry point or an empty state for the Delivery Challans feature. It educates the user on the purpose and lifecycle of a delivery challan and provides primary actions to create a new one or view an existing list.

businessEntities.name: Delivery Challan
evidence: Life cycle of a Delivery Challan

workflows.name: Create a new Delivery Challan
steps: User clicks the 'New' or 'Create Delivery Challan' button.
The application is expected to display a form for entering the details of a new delivery challan.

workflows.name: View all Delivery Challans
steps: User clicks the 'All Delivery Challans' button.
The application is expected to navigate to a page listing all existing delivery challans.

workflows.name: Navigate to a different application module
steps: User clicks a link in the main navigation sidebar (e.g., 'Invoices', 'Customers', 'Items').
The user is navigated to the corresponding module's main page.

userGoals.goal: Create a delivery challan for goods being shipped.
evidence: Create, customize and print professional Delivery Challans

userGoals.goal: View and manage all existing delivery challans.
Understand the workflow and purpose of delivery challans within the system.
evidence: Life cycle of a Delivery Challan

userGoals.goal: Access other related parts of the application, such as Sales, Inventory, or Purchases.

predictedMissingUI.reason: The 'New' and 'Create Delivery Challan' buttons directly imply the existence of a form to input data for a new challan, but this form is not visible on the current page.
The 'All Delivery Challans' button implies a view to display all existing records, which is not present on this introductory page.

pageNarrative: This page is the main landing area for the 'Delivery Challans' module within a comprehensive business management application. It serves as an empty state, guiding the user on how to start using the feature with prominent 'Create Delivery Challan' and 'New' buttons. The page also provides educational content, including a diagram of the 'Life cycle of a Delivery Challan' to explain its function. Through a persistent side navigation bar, the user can easily access other related modules like Sales, Purchases, and Inventory, positioning this feature within the broader context of the application's sales workflow.
